body:
## Rationale

MetalForge has 14 live SoundLike guide pages ('How to Sound Like [Drummer]') that are perfect candidates for **HowTo JSON-LD schema** — and currently have none. These guides already contain step-by-step technique sections (grip, kick pattern, practice exercises, gear recommendations), making them a natural fit for Google's HowTo rich result format.

This directly unlocks:
1. **Google HowTo rich results** — visual step cards shown in SERPs
2. **Voice search answers** — 'OK Google, how do I play like Lars Ulrich?' pulls structured steps
3. **AI Overview eligibility** — structured step content is a prime AI Overview citation source
4. **People Also Ask** — FAQPage + HowTo combination maximizes PAA boxes

The 14 live guides cover: joey-jordison, danny-carey, lars-ulrich, dave-lombardo, mario-duplantier, tomas-haake, gene-hoglan, brann-dailor, matt-halpern, chris-adler, matt-greiner, george-kollias, travis-orbin, flo-mounier.

The SEO plan Phase 5b listed HowTo schema as 'feature-dependent (if setup-guide content added)' — the SoundLike guides ARE that content. The dependency is resolved; the schema is just missing.

## Files to touch

- `api/meta/[...path].js` or equivalent SSR meta handler — add HowTo JSON-LD generation for `/sound-like/<slug>` routes
- Schema shape to add:

```json
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "HowTo",
  "name": "How to Sound Like Lars Ulrich",
  "description": "Step-by-step guide to replicating Lars Ulrich's Metallica drumming style",
  "step": [
    {
      "@type": "HowToStep",
      "name": "Grip and Stick Control",
      "text": "Lars uses a matched grip with...",
      "position": 1
    },
    {
      "@type": "HowToStep",
      "name": "Kick Drum Technique",
      "text": "The hallmark of Lars's style is...",
      "position": 2
    },
    {
      "@type": "HowToStep",
      "name": "Signature Patterns",
      "text": "Practice these key rhythmic figures...",
      "position": 3
    }
  ],
  "tool": [
    {"@type": "HowToTool", "name": "Tama Starclassic drum kit"},
    {"@type": "HowToTool", "name": "Zildjian A Custom cymbals"}
  ]
}
```

Reference: https://schema.org/HowTo

## Quality gate

- HowTo schema present on all 14 /sound-like/<slug> pages
- Each has ≥3 HowToStep entries mapped from existing guide content
- HowToTool entries reference the drummer's actual gear (already in soundLikeGuides.js data)
- Existing FAQPage schema preserved (not replaced)
- Validate via Google Rich Results Test

## Estimated organic uplift

SoundLike guides already get organic clicks (Matt Greiner is our #2 GSC query by clicks at 15.38% CTR, pos 7.5). HowTo schema upgrades the rich result presentation from a blue link to structured step cards, increasing CTR by an estimated 15–25% on these pages. Voice search is a growing channel for technique queries.

## Verify

- [ ] curl https://metalforge.io/sound-like/how-to-sound-like-lars-ulrich | grep -i 'HowTo' — returns match
- [ ] Google Rich Results Test shows HowTo eligible for ≥1 guide
- [ ] ≥3 HowToStep entries per page
- [ ] FAQPage schema still present alongside HowTo

## Done

HowTo JSON-LD added to all 14 SoundLike guide pages via SSR meta handler.
title: SEO: Add HowTo JSON-LD schema to existing SoundLike guide pages (14 pages — AI Overview + voice search unlock)
